what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-assets image named Icon_Gold_Drone, storing its identifier, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, versioning, and timestamps.
observations: w and h are both 0 despite the file being an image/png
the alt text for the single version is an empty string
there is exactly one version with identical created and updated timestamps
standouts: Single version with no linked relationships
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter inside a markdown file
Versioned blob references with author and timestamp
concerns: Zero width/height suggests missing or unprocessed image metadata

No links or usage context are provided
notes: A metadata stub for a gold drone icon asset that has a blob reference but unresolved dimensions and no descriptive text.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose appears to be cataloging an image asset; the actual content is a metadata stub with missing dimensions and descriptive fields.
intention_signals: To register and track a gold drone icon in the design-assets channel by linking it to a stored blob and recording authorship and versioning information.
contribution: Provides a stable identifier, blob pointer, and provenance metadata for the Icon_Gold_Drone asset, which a fused system can use to locate and version the image.
